title: scleranthus orientalis
intro: Scleranthus orientalis, also known as the Chinese button flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scleranthus orientalis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating digestive issues, as well as having a sedative effect on the nervous system. Scleranthus orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
